objectives.description: Add declare -A task_successors global near existing declare -A task_deps
Create build_successors_map() function that inverts task_deps
Call build_successors_map after build_graph in main section
In print_tree_node(): change task_deps to task_successors
In generate_grouped_section(): change label to 'indented = depends on parent'
objectives.note: Also changed root selection to only start from wave-1 (no-dep) tasks

objectives.description: In generate_dependency_tree(): change label to 'indented = depends on parent'

deviations.reason: Root selection logic in topic section also needed to change (start only from wave-1 tasks) to match the new successors direction, otherwise higher-numbered wave-1 tasks would be missed as roots
